title: Welcome to SKR Forum!
content: This forum is now connected with HSS.json. You can read posts from the JSON file, add new posts, and export the updated data back into HSS.json!

title: How to run this locally
content:
Because modern browsers block loading local files (CORS policy) when opening an HTML file directly (file://), it's best to run a quick local server. 

You can open your terminal in this folder and type:
python -m http.server

Then visit http://localhost:8000 in your browser!
